occupation: Head of Global OOH at dentsu
summary: As Head of Global OOH at dentsu, I lead the centralised OOH team and work with the dentsu network to drive strategic initiatives to expand OOH spend and market share. With a deep understanding of OOH’s real-world impact, my role is to champion OOH for its role in delivering measurable business outcomes for clients, as well as helping brands connect with audiences across local, regional, and global markets.

experiences.title: Client & Growth Lead, OOH, Amplifi Global
experiences.description: As Client & Growth Lead I am responsible for the global OOH team's largest billing agency, key direct clients, as well as focusing on growth and new business across the dentsu network.

experiences.title: Business Director, OOH, Amplifi Global
experiences.description: Part of the global dentsu OOH team. Responsible for key direct clients, new business, and the relationship between the OOH team and Merkle B2B, dentsu's award winning B2B agency.

experiences.title: International Business Development Director
experiences.description: Responsible across all major planning and buying agencies as well as client direct. Moved over from the UK to bring in new business, since then I have successfully won new clients and developed new relationships with key stakeholders.

experiences.title: Senior Commercial Manager (Airport)
experiences.description:
Working across Kinetic International, bespoke international agencies and JCDecaux OneWorld offices (London, Paris, Milan, Munich, Shanghai, New York & San Francisco). 

Active across key clients, representing over 50% of JCDecaux Airport UK revenue.

experiences.title: Head of Insight (Airport)
experiences.description:
Responsible for the development of insight strategy. My role involves developing and implementing research strategy to support marketing and sales strategy. 

One of my key areas of responsibility is working closely with the sales team to ensure sales pitches are fully and appropriately resourced.

experiences.title: Market Research Assistant/Insight Executive/Senior Insight Executive (Airport)
Work Placement - Group Marketing
experiences.description: Gained experience in; Research and Planning, Digital Marketing, Social Media and Commercial Marketing.
